reasoning: Phase B Task B8 ships a first-class GDPR rights surface at /settings/privacy. The page mounts a <PrivacyRightsPanel> with two cards — Article 15 (right of access) export + Article 17 (right to erasure) delete. Export POSTs /api/settings/privacy/export which returns a stable JSON envelope (schema_version=1, tenant_id, exported_at_iso, wizard projects, IA artifacts, design uploads, interview threads, business proposals) and sets Content-Disposition: attachment so the browser triggers a download. The client uses a Blob + temporary anchor by default; tests inject a downloadImpl seam so the suite asserts on filename + content without touching jsdom's URL polyfill. Erase opens a @caia/ui Dialog with a confirmation input — the user must type the literal word ERASE before the Confirm button POSTs /api/settings/privacy/erase. Stub path (default) returns the same response shape as live mode so the client UX is identical; live path gated on WIZARD_PRIVACY_ERASE_LIVE=1 currently returns 503 with erase-live-not-implemented (the full cascade with GdprCoordinator + Infisical deleteWorkspace + Postgres DROP + tenant.erased NATS publish ships in a Wave-2 follow-up that needs per-tenant context wiring). A new tenant.erased event is registered in @chiefaia/events-taxonomy-internal's registry.yaml (severity warning, actors [api,user,system], payload [tenant_id, email, schema_name, ux_uploads_deleted, secrets_workspace_deleted, schema_dropped, occurred_at_iso]) plus added to the EventType union + EVENT_SEVERITY map so subscribers (Audit Steward, Pipeline Conductor, Dashboard) can type-safely consume it. 22 vitest cases + 1 Playwright E2E (gated on WIZARD_E2E_BASE_URL). Brief asked for >=15. Whole wizard suite green at 356/356.

reuseSearchResults.considered_for: page primitives + confirmation modal + GDPR-article tags
reuseSearchResults.reason: Mandatory per ADR-065. Card + Button drive the two cards; Dialog provides the confirmation modal; Badge (destructive variant for Art. 17, outline for Art. 15) communicates risk at a glance.

Canonical taxonomy. Adding the event to registry.yaml + EventType union + EVENT_SEVERITY map is the only sanctioned way to introduce a new event — the union is structurally enforced across every consumer.

The coordinator already orchestrates the snapshotter + uxUploads + secrets fanout. The live path imports it dynamically (so the heavy deps only load when WIZARD_PRIVACY_ERASE_LIVE=1) and wires it once the per-tenant context plumbing lands. V1 stub keeps the response shape identical so the client UX never changes.
GdprCoordinator already fans into the secrets adapter; we don't bypass it. The route's V1 stub path documents the deferral.

reuseSearchResults.candidate: Inline yaml-parser for the registry test
reuseSearchResults.reason: The existing tenant.provisioned test uses raw-text regex matching for the exact same reason — no yaml dep in the wizard app. Following the same pattern keeps the test surface tight.
Single-field, single-rule (string equality to 'ERASE'). Adding a form library would be a new dependency for a 5-line useState.

modifications: Live path for the erase cascade currently returns 503 with erase-live-not-implemented. The four-stage cascade (GdprCoordinator → Infisical workspace deletion → Postgres schema DROP → tenant.erased NATS publish) requires per-tenant context that the route does not yet plumb; ships in a Wave-2 follow-up minor PR. Documented inline. The stub path's response shape is identical to the live path's so the client UX is forward-compatible.

Export envelope's wizard.projects + ia_artifacts + design_uploads + business_proposals sections are intentionally empty in V1 because the in-memory state stores do not yet expose listByTenant. Interview threads also empty for the same reason. The schema_version=1 + tenant_id + exported_at_iso scaffold is stable; Wave 2 widens the store APIs and re-runs the export against per-tenant Pg views. Documented inline.

Confirmation word is case-sensitive ('ERASE' only) — typing 'erase' or '  ERASE  ' is rejected at both the client + the route. The double-check is deliberate: the client check gives instant feedback, the server check prevents script-driven destruction of a tenant.
Playwright E2E is gated on WIZARD_E2E_BASE_URL so the unit-test runner stays fast in CI. Operator runs it locally against `pnpm dev -p 7788` or against a deployed wizard URL.

evidence.typecheckDelta: no new TS errors in B8 files
